steps.action: Create tension: werk add 'write novel' 'have outline'
Add note: werk note <id> 'met with team to discuss plot'

steps.observed: Mutation History shows [note] entry: 'met with team to discuss plot'

evidence.stdout: Note mutation recorded as [note] in mutation history with field='note' content

steps.action: Add note to resolved tension: werk note <id> 'post-completion retrospective notes'
Show tension to verify note recorded
steps.expected: Note appears in mutation history after status change
steps.observed: Mutation History shows [note] after [status] Active -> Resolved

evidence.stdout: Note successfully added to resolved tension, recorded as separate mutation after resolution

steps.action: Add general note: werk note 'general observation about the writing process'

steps.expected: General note appears in workspace notes list
steps.observed: Workspace notes (1): 'general observation about the writing process' with timestamp

evidence.stdout: General note stored separately from tension mutations, retrievable via 'werk notes' command

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All note functionality working as specified: annotation mutations recorded, notes work on resolved tensions, and general workspace notes stored separately.
